Bugs & Suggestions

Found a bug or have an idea? Fill out the form below, or contact Bennett (admin) directly at admin@lmc.kervian.com.

Please enter your name.
Contact * At least one is required
Only used to follow up if needed.
Please provide a Minecraft username or email address.
Please select a type.
Please enter a subject.
Please enter a description.
